title: Choices (Ketch up) by TheSoloist feat.th3scr1b3 & Andre
lyrics: I ain't gonna live forever I'm trying to live forever I ain't gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever I ain't trying to live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever Creativity to live forever, forever, you Immensity to live forever, forever, you All praise is due to the Most High And everything perceived by my third eye I was raised a Jehovah's Witness Found quickly nothing was in it Fuck that organized religion I'm a soldier with a vision Addiction was not an option Give me a fighting chance I'd fight any nigga in tropical Yeah, I seen motherfuckers get mutilated Separated, disintegrated, I barely made it Yeah, you motherfuckers don't want none Gatlin, I named my own son after a huge gun Yeah, that means I'm really with the bullshit And I don't waste no time My time is precious in the pulpit Live forever, I ain't gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever How you gonna be forever, forever, forever, forever, forever Sing the songs, sing the music of our times Live forever, forever, forever, forever How you gonna go down that line To live forever, forever, forever, forever And Mr. X to the Z, listen Yeah, the X-Man with a ex-wife So many demons you would think I was the Antichrist Yeah, talking down on your websites Bitch, I ain't on the web, I'm in real life Suck a nigga in his forehead Put something on his mind, cross the line, nigga, go ahead And that shit don't make me tough I'm tough cause I chose to live after decades of fucking up The D.O.C., my favorite rapper Is there really an afterlife? And if so, can I smoke a backwood? Yeah, I gave my life to artistic endeavors And took the measure to assure I would be here forever How you gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever How you gonna sing your song forever, forever, forever, forever, forever Put your lives down in the pavement Put your stance on the wall Tell us your feelings about you And stand for something now Through song and music you can uplift your people Stand tall on your own Through these rhymes and through these songs We're gonna live forever How you come around to live forever, forever, forever, forever How you gonna sing with us and live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever And you Do, do, do, do, do X to the Z and it's cry baby Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: I ain't gonna live forever
I'm trying to live forever
I ain't gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
I ain't trying to live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
Creativity to live forever, forever, you
Immensity to live forever, forever, you
All praise is due to the Most High
And everything perceived by my third eye
I was raised a Jehovah's Witness
Found quickly nothing was in it
Fuck that organized religion
I'm a soldier with a vision
Addiction was not an option
Give me a fighting chance
I'd fight any nigga in tropical
Yeah, I seen motherfuckers get mutilated
Separated, disintegrated, I barely made it
Yeah, you motherfuckers don't want none
Gatlin, I named my own son after a huge gun
Yeah, that means I'm really with the bullshit
And I don't waste no time
My time is precious in the pulpit
Live forever, I ain't gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
How you gonna be forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
Sing the songs, sing the music of our times
Live forever, forever, forever, forever
How you gonna go down that line
To live forever, forever, forever, forever
And Mr. X to the Z, listen
Yeah, the X-Man with a ex-wife
So many demons you would think I was the Antichrist
Yeah, talking down on your websites
Bitch, I ain't on the web, I'm in real life
Suck a nigga in his forehead
Put something on his mind, cross the line, nigga, go ahead
And that shit don't make me tough
I'm tough cause I chose to live after decades of fucking up
The D.O.C., my favorite rapper
Is there really an afterlife?
And if so, can I smoke a backwood?
Yeah, I gave my life to artistic endeavors
And took the measure to assure I would be here forever
How you gonna live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
How you gonna sing your song forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
Put your lives down in the pavement
Put your stance on the wall
Tell us your feelings about you
And stand for something now
Through song and music you can uplift your people
Stand tall on your own
Through these rhymes and through these songs
We're gonna live forever
How you come around to live forever, forever, forever, forever
How you gonna sing with us and live forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
And you
Do, do, do, do, do
X to the Z and it's cry baby
Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
Thanks for watching!
